message:
feat(core): promote setjmp/longjmp and tcgetattr/tcsetattr from todo! placeholders to phase-1 deterministic stubs

setjmp: now captures phase-1 context metadata via `phase1_setjmp_capture` and
returns 0 (matching POSIX direct-call semantics). longjmp: validates the saved
context through `phase1_longjmp_restore` and panics with an explicit
deferred-backend-transfer payload instead of a generic todo!. This wires up
the existing phase-1 validation infrastructure so tests exercise real context
capture and error paths rather than just asserting todo! panics.

Tests updated: `setjmp_returns_zero_and_captures_context_metadata` verifies
the capture path end-to-end; `longjmp_panics_with_deferred_backend_transfer_message`
checks the valid-context panic payload; `longjmp_panics_with_normalized_zero_value`
verifies POSIX val=0->1 normalization; `longjmp_panics_with_invalid_context_error`
checks the uninitialized-env error path.

termios: tcgetattr now returns -1 without mutating the struct (phase-1
deterministic stub replacing todo!). tcsetattr validates the optional_actions
parameter via `valid_optional_actions` before returning -1. Three new tests
verify the placeholder semantics: non-mutation guarantee, valid-action
acceptance, and invalid-action rejection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
